name: entry_base_idx_equals_num_entries
reason: `idx` can equal `X86_NUM_ENTRIES` (512), not just be less than it — the precondition allows one-past-the-end index, producing an address potentially beyond the mapped region

name: inv_no_layer_count_lower_bound
reason: An `Arch` with zero layers satisfies `inv()` — the invariant only bounds layers from above (`<= X86_NUM_LAYERS`) but has no minimum, so an empty architecture is considered valid
